flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 67% at FIDM-Fashion Institute of Design & Merchandising vs the 2004–2008 baseline (1.3k vs 4.0k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at FIDM-Fashion Institute of Design & Merchandising rose 63% between 2007 and 2010 ($6.1k → $10.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at FIDM-Fashion Institute of Design & Merchandising rose 23% between 2007 and 2010 ($19.8k → $24.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at FIDM-Fashion Institute of Design & Merchandising fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (73.8% → 65.3%).
